title: Boards-View

posts.author: IsraelDadon1 (Israeldadon1)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to temporary ‘freeze’/pin the last Board view so when switching between boards I would find the last view (even to limit it on time). now rolling deep into columns (let’s say column#50), when moving to other Biard and back to the Board you should spent time to reach the last column. the current functionality is not comfortable when you jump between boards to update data.
